response:
MOORE LAW WILL STOP WHEN PHYSICAL LIMITS OF TRANSISTOR SCALING ARE REACHED DUE TO QUANTUM TUNNELING EFFECTS AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES THAT CURRENT MATERIALS CANNOT OVERCOME.
